message:
test(core): expand fold-embeddings test coverage

Adds comprehensive tests for the protein fold embedding utilities that
were previously only lightly tested. New coverage includes:

computeNovelty:
- Edge case: empty corpus returns novelty=1 with explanatory note
- Edge case: orthogonal vectors correctly yield maximum novelty

nearestNeighbors:
- Verifies k-nearest sorted by distance with correct metadata
- Self-exclusion: target gene is excluded from its own neighbors
- Empty corpus handling
- Filters out embeddings with empty/missing vectors

encodeFloat32VectorLE / decodeFloat32VectorLE:
- Round-trip encoding/decoding preserves values
- Correct byte length calculation (4 bytes per float)
- Empty vector handling
- Direct ArrayBuffer decoding
- Dimension truncation via dims parameter

buildEmbeddingMap:
- Map creation keyed by geneId
- Empty array handling
- Duplicate geneId overwrites (last wins)

attachEmbeddingInfo:
- Correctly attaches embeddings to matching GeneInfo records
- Preserves all gene properties
- Handles missing embeddings gracefully
- Empty inputs handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
